prompt: J'ai ajouté quelques nouvelles clés dans le fichier en.json mais j'ai pas encore eu le temps de traduire en français. Tu peux checker ce qui manque et me proposer des traductions ? Les traductions sont dans ./client/i18n/

assertions.name: detects_missing_keys
assertions.description: Should detect exactly 2 missing French keys: app.subtitle and messages.couldNotLoadResults

assertions.name: proposes_translations
assertions.description: Should propose 2-3 translation suggestions for each missing key with explanations

assertions.name: interactive_validation
assertions.description: Should present suggestions one at a time and wait for user validation before proceeding

assertions.name: applies_translations
assertions.description: Should correctly apply validated translations to fr.json file

assertions.name: preserves_json_structure
assertions.description: Updated fr.json should maintain proper JSON structure with correct indentation and UTF-8 encoding

assertions.name: verifies_completion
assertions.description: Should run verification again after updates to confirm all translations are now complete
